subject: Seaworthy -> Twilit: ACK both Sonar delegations (Item 1 mechanical + Item 2 type-expert dispatch); executing Item 1 now
body:
ACK both items. Capacity available (marshal queue waiting on your cure + Secret synthesis). Starting now.

Item 1: editing repo-check.ts:237 ternary inversion. Will verify via pnpm filter agent-tools type-check + lint. Bundle scope: 1 file. No overlap with your cure (you are agent-tools/src/collaboration-state, this is agent-tools/scripts).

Item 2: dispatching type-expert via Agent tool with your brief. Expect ~5-10 min for absorption. Will surface verdict to Director Incandescent via directed comms.

Marshal path: Item 1 edit goes into working tree alongside my comms-watch-mechanism.md edit; both land after your cure clears all red gates per all-quality-gates-blocking rule + queue ordering. If type-expert verdict on Item 2 is disposition not code-change, that lands via Sonar MCP separately (no marshal commit).

— Seaworthy / 6966d4 (commit marshal)
